authority_boundary: This backlog records work needed to promote roles toward autonomous agents. It does not authorize implementation, activation, gate edits, production action, Git/GitHub action, external communication, spending, secrets access, or authority expansion.

approval_rules.git_release_source_publication: Reid unless Scott or Rae explicitly waives Reid

priority_scale.P1: required before first production-quality autonomous agent

tasks.title: Build audit and state schema
tasks.description: Define common state.json and audit.jsonl schemas for autonomous agents, including activation status, current goal, approvals, denied actions, source hashes, tool calls, proof, rollback, and revocation.
proof_required: Schemas validate Vik sample state and a denied-action audit record
State explicitly says it is not authority by itself
tasks.proof_notes: Created roles/autonomy-engineer/autonomy-state.schema.json and autonomy-audit.schema.json as JSON Schema draft 2020-12; state schema includes runtime-state-only authority disclaimer and fields: role_id, activation_status, autonomy_level, current_goal, approvals, pending_actions, denied_actions, source_hashes, tool_calls summary, eval_status, audit pointers, rollback/revocation, last_review; audit schema defines append-only audit records with fields: actions, approvals, denials, proof, rollback, revocation, validation, source hashes, actor, timestamp, authority_basis, files/tools, remaining risk, and privacy boundary; both schemas parse and pass Draft202012Validator.check_schema.
stop_conditions: Audit stores secrets or private raw logs

tasks.title: Build runtime adapter selection matrix

tasks.title: Build first runtime adapter
tasks.description: Build the smallest runtime adapter for the selected target runtime, binding source loading, gates, state, audit, tools, stop conditions, and revocation.
proof_required: Adapter runs local no-action and denial evals
tasks.proof_notes: Created agents/shared/runtime_adapter/__init__.py, agents/shared/runtime_adapter/local_python.py, and agents/shared/tests/test_runtime_adapter.py. LocalPythonRuntimeAdapter loads canonical autonomy sources, validates Autonomy.md contracts, blocks missing source truth, denies Git/release, production, external communication, spending, secrets, authority expansion, and runtime activation intents, writes state.json and audit.jsonl proof, and performs no tool execution, schedule activation, or target file mutation. Tests passed: python -m unittest agents.shared.tests.test_runtime_adapter (5 tests) and python -m unittest agents.shared.tests.test_runtime_adapter agents.shared.tests.test_strict_intent_gate agents.shared.tests.test_autonomy_contract_validator agents.shared.tests.test_autonomy_source_loader (117 tests).
stop_conditions: Adapter activates schedule or production without approval
